title: 🆕 INFINITE CALENDAR & LAUNCH TOGGLE ACTIVE!
message: Limits removed! Explore an infinite history calendar with zero lag, use the new toggle to skip the opening video, and enjoy a faster, smoother experience across the app. ⚒️🔥
points: 📅 Infinite Calendar for Everyone: Scroll as far back into your history or ahead into the future as you want. Fully unlocked for all users!
⚡ Stutter-Free Navigation: Tapping a date card now switches your view instantly without making the calendar bar shift or jump around.
🚀 Intro Video Toggle: Turn off the launch video using the new 'Intro Cinematic' switch in the Stats tab to open the app instantly.
↩️ Quick Return Button: Added a simple, right-docked shortcut button to automatically snap your calendar view back to Today.
🔧 Stability Hardening: Fixed an issue where the ad recovery popup would display incorrectly, ensuring smoother reward processing.

title: 🌌 MULTI-CORE AI OVERHAUL ACTIVE!
message: Shuttered limits. The Forge AI ecosystem now supports hot-swapping multiple localized compute engines on the fly. Awaken the precise level of offline intelligence your device demands! ⚒️🔥
points: ⚡ Expanded Multi-Core Matrix: Download and manage specialized High Power, Standard, or Lite AI models natively.
🔄 Instant Hot-Swapping: Swap active intelligence engines dynamically in chat without restarting the application.
📡 Link Stabilization Panel: Added a stable network banner framework with custom bug reporting integration.
🖼️ Aspect Ratio Correction: Re-engineered preview poster canvases to scale custom verification photos perfectly.
🛡️ Hardened System Security: Optimized task calibration parameters and fortified background asset logic streams.

title: 🧠 NEURAL CORE AI HAS AWAKENED!
message: The Forge has evolved. Introducing Neural Core AI—your private, on-device tactical intelligence. Forge your path with the power of localized AI and master your discipline like never before. ⚒️🔥
points: 🤖 On-Device AI: Chat with your personal discipline mentor—100% private and offline.
⚡ AI Task Generation: Create Habits, Trackers, and DOT protocols entirely through chat.
🎯 Tactical Commands: Instantly set Timeline Targets and Focus Timers using AI insights.
🛡️ Privacy Absolute: Your AI conversations are processed locally and never touch the cloud.
🚀 Engine Overhaul: Massive performance boosts and refined UI for the v4.0.0 era.

title: ⚒️ THE FORGE POSTERS ARE HERE!
message: Your discipline deserves more than just a log—it deserves a spotlight. 🔥 Turn your daily grind into premium, shareable art and showcase your journey to the world. 🖼️💪
points: 🎨 Dynamic Achievement Posters: Create stunning, Instagram-ready 4:5 posters for every win.
📈 Full Timeline Snapshots: Share your entire tracker or challenge journey in one epic visual.
✨ Premium Aesthetic Overhaul: A complete redesign of the sharing experience for maximum impact.
🛡️ Proof of Work Spotlight: Your notes and images, now formatted in professional, high-end layouts.
🚀 Optimized Performance: Smoother transitions and refined UI across the Forge.
